---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

**Proposed solution**
How should it work?

**Which layer does this affect?**
- [ ] mg-mode-core (Layer 2 — orchestration, routing, governance, profiles)
- [ ] agency-agents (Layer 1 — new role or role improvement)
- [ ] gstack (Layer 1 — new workflow skill)
- [ ] promptfoo (Layer 1 — new validation plugin)

**Alternatives considered**
What other approaches did you think about?

**Additional context**
Any examples, links, or references.
